description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story structure set on a slightly sloped, irregularly shaped plot of land. The building features a clean, angular design with a flat roof and a light gray exterior, likely made of concrete or stucco. Large, rectangular windows are distributed asymmetrically along the visible facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. Adjacent to the main building is a prominent spherical structure enclosed in a wireframe or mesh, possibly serving as a decorative or functional architectural element. The surrounding terrain is a muted brown, simulating earth or grass, and the overall setting suggests a contemporary residential environment. The absence of visible porches or verandas and the minimalistic design reinforce the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and asymmetrical window placement, set on a sloped plot with a distinctive spherical mesh structure beside it.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, showing the main entrance area, large windows, and the adjacent spherical mesh structure.
description_view_1: A top-down angled view highlights the angular layout of the bungalow and the proximity of the spherical mesh structure to the building.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, with the spherical mesh structure more prominent and the window arrangement on the back facade apparent.
description_view_3: A side and partial rear view shows the building's length, the flat roof, and the relationship between the bungalow and the surrounding terrain.
